name: Precision 7 Golf
about: Precision 7 Golf is a golf simulation venue that provides a space for playing virtual golf. The venue offers a selection of food and drink options and accepts various payment methods including Square, CashApp, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and multiple credit cards. It is designed for both casual play and more serious golf practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Accepts both food and drink on-site
Variety of leagues and corporate event options
Designed to cater to both casual and serious golfers

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use at Precision 7 Golf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, Precision 7 Golf has its own kitchen and bar where you can purchase food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the number of players and pace of play. It's best to check with the venue for an estimated time.

faq.question: Is Precision 7 Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Precision 7 Golf appears to be a kid-friendly venue suitable for families.
